message:
Fix FTS5 MATCH queries returning 0 results (issue #37)

Fts5Cursor::filter() was a no-op stub that cleared results but never
populated them, so MATCH queries always returned empty. Now filter()
parses the query via parse_fts5_query()/build_expr(), evaluates it
against the inverted index with BM25 scoring, and populates results.
The cursor receives snapshots of the index and documents at open() time.
Also added full-scan support for idx_num==0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
